Params: {1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1483.jpg'}
{3: 'You can make out a trail of strange footprints on the ground by the pale moonlight.'}
{3: 'Bloody rat tracks stretch all the way to the distant House of Peace, where they finally disappear.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory896.jpg'}
{3: 'What awaits you is an unbelievable sight: a bizarre banquet is underway inside the House of Peace.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'The hall blazes with light, but the guests are not smiling hosts and visitors. Only crowds of vacant-eyed townsfolk and countless bloated rats are attending the banquet.'}
{3: 'Those same faces appeared before you during your first visit to the House of Peace.'}
{3: 'But now, these people no longer wear expressions of devotion, as if their will has been seized by some unseen force.'}
{3: 'Hearing the commotion at the entrance, the mad townsfolk at the banquet table lift their heads, but their faces remain vacant and expressionless.'}
{2: 'Mad Townsfolk', 3: 'Come this way...', 4: '1', 5: '2', 6: '3'}
{2: 'Mad Townsfolk', 3: 'The feast... is about... to begin...', 4: '1', 5: '2', 6: '3'}
{3: 'The gaunt townsfolk move in perfect unison, performing eerie, synchronized gestures.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStoryFront/BgStoryFront17.png', 4: '4'}
{3: 'Everyone takes up daggers and slashes open their own hands, blood streaming down in torrents.'}
{3: 'Warm blood flows down their bodies, pooling at their feet in crimson puddles.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStoryFront/BgStoryFront17.png', 4: '4', 5: '1'}
{3: 'Faint animal sounds emerge from the mist as countless rats with long tails appear from every direction, scrambling eagerly onto the banquet table.'}
{3: 'The rats swarm forward, greedily lapping up the blood.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Mad Townsfolk', 3: 'Accept... our... offering...', 4: '1'}
{3: 'A familiar eerie sensation surfaces in your mind.'}
{3: 'It was the same phenomenon you witnessed in Veronica\'s prophetic nightmare.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Veronica', 3: 'You filthy things... Get away from me!', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Veronica angrily drives off the swarm of rats, but the grotesque creatures retreat into the shadows with blood still staining their muzzles, lurking and waiting.'}
{2: 'Veronica', 3: '...Why would you do such a thing?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Veronica', 3: 'Go home. You all have families.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Looking at the blood-soaked townsfolk, Veronica carries unmistakable compassion in her voice.'}
{3: 'She knows the Mist has already corrupted their minds beyond salvation.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Mad Townsfolk', 3: 'Offering... to... the Siren...', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Mad Townsfolk', 3: 'Siren... protects... us...', 4: '1'}
{3: 'But they no longer recognize their sheriff, only muttering the same delirious words.'}
{1: '1', 2: '???', 3: 'Long time no see, Sheriff Veronica.', 4: '2'}
{3: 'A hoarse voice rings out behind you, like a phantom extending an invitation.'}
{3: 'A slender figure emerges from the shadows, having arrived unnoticed.'}
{2: 'Veronica', 3: 'Don\'t you have anything better to do than lurking around like a ghost, Roko?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Roko', 3: 'You\'re still as dedicated as ever, I see. And you\'ve got yourself a new "ally."', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Veronica', 3: 'It\'s not your place to judge my actions.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Veronica', 3: 'And hearing that from a coward who refused to shoulder any responsibility while working for the sheriff makes me sick.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Veronica', 3: 'Coward! You abandoned your duty!', 4: '1'}
{3: 'But the man shows no reaction to Veronica\'s harsh rebuke, his expression remaining unchanged.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Roko', 3: 'I never deserved the faith you placed in me, Sheriff.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Roko', 3: 'After all, I was nothing but an insignificant clerk under your command. Hardly someone capable of shouldering such weighty responsibilities.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Roko', 3: 'I don\'t have your combat prowess, nor the exceptional intellect of the late Aleksei.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Roko', 3: 'All I could do was dig through stacks of documents for some way to break a deadlock... I was a nobody, really.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Roko', 3: 'Of course, everyone knows what happened next. If we\'d actually found a way to resist the Mist, would any of these tragedies have occurred?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Roko', 3: 'So... when faced with a force beyond our understanding, I chose to... fear and worship it.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Roko', 3: 'As long as we show enough devotion, we can summon the Bloodthirsty Siren... and the siren will protect us from the Mist\'s torment.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Roko', 3: 'See? My devotion has spared me from the Mist\'s harm. This is the gift the Bloodthirsty Siren has granted me.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Roko', 3: 'As for those who lost their minds to the Mist... their devotion simply wasn\'t enough...', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 3: 'But Veronica completely dismisses his deranged ramblings, showing only disgust.'}
{2: 'Veronica', 3: 'Still trying to peddle that manipulative nonsense in front of me?', 4: '1'}

{2: 'Veronica', 3: 'I know exactly what goes through your mind... You\'re a coward who only cares about saving your own skin, and you abandon all principles the moment you can benefit from something.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Veronica', 3: 'I know how many people live in fear of those baseless rumors, and I know you exploit that fear to manipulate them.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Veronica', 3: 'I\'ve thought about wiping you all out countless times... but I held myself back, refusing to harm the innocent caught up in your schemes.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Veronica', 3: 'They\'ve lost their minds... but they were once people who lived in this town.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Faced with Veronica\'s accusations, Roko offers no defense, only responds with a calm smile.'}
{3: 'Acting like he\'s the one in control, he gestures as if he is welcoming guests.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Roko', 3: 'Is that so? Then by all means, try.', 4: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryLineFocusNew.prefab', 2: '2'}
{3: 'Veronica finally reaches her breaking point, unable to tolerate his provocations any longer. She raises her lance and strikes at the man she despises.'}
{3: 'Yet the lance\'s deadly thrust strikes nothing but air.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiHitNew.prefab', 2: '2'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryLineFocusNew.prefab'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiDuihualiziEndRed.prefab', 2: '2'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiDuihualiziEndRed.prefab', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 3: 'The mortal flesh that once housed him vanishes in an instant, replaced by a vaguely humanoid shadow.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiDuihualiziEndRed.prefab', 3: '1'}
{1: 'DialogDisable'}
{3: 'You cautiously step forward to stand beside her, raising your gun and taking aim at the shadowy figure.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: 'RImgBg1Shake'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: 'RImgBg1Shake'}
{3: 'The bullets pass straight through the shadow with no apparent effect, the casings clattering to the ground with sharp metallic clangs.'}
{3: 'The "shadow" continues speaking in a calm, measured tone.'}
{3: 'With a form no longer bound by mortal flesh, he wields power no longer bound by the mortal world.'}
{2: '"Roko"', 3: 'The feast has been prepared. Why not join us?', 4: '1'}
{2: '"Roko"', 3: 'Together, we shall offer the final sacrifice and welcome the arrival of the "Bloodthirsty Siren".', 4: '1'}
{2: '"Roko"', 3: 'Come now, Veronica... No, I should call you by your true name... Bloodthirsty Siren.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Curtains rise at the center of the banquet hall, and candle flames dance in the shadows. The twisted "feast" is about to begin.'}
{3: 'The guests at this banquet are mad townsfolk, vermin, and their deranged host.'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory896.jpg', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '0.8'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory896.jpg'}
{3: 'And at the center of the banquet hall lies an unthinkable "sacrifice."'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Eileena lies unconscious and bound, sleeping silently at the center of the hall.'}
